description: Ethnic thong-style sandals with block heels from catwalk. Fashioned for the ethnic diva, these sandals can be worn with ethnic ensembles Upper Thong style straps made of suede with heavy stone, wooden and plastic bead embellishments Suede lining for durability and comfort Synthetic leather toe separator for a snug Fit Padded footbed with branding for comfort Footbed stitched to the outsole for durability Outsole TPU outsole with wedge heels Herringbone pattern on the forefoot and terraced grooves on the heel for added comfort Slipper Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
